title: DIY Macrame Keychain
excerpt: Learn how to create a beautiful handmade macrame keychain perfect for gifts or personal use.

steps.title: Cut your cords
steps.description: Cut 4 pieces of cord, each about 40cm long.

steps.title: Attach to keyring
steps.description: Fold each cord in half and attach to the keyring using a lark's head knot.

steps.title: Create square knots
steps.description: Make a series of square knots going down about 3-4cm.

steps.title: Finish and trim
steps.description: Tie a gathering knot at the bottom and trim the ends to create a tassel.

tips: Use a clipboard to hold the keyring while working
Add beads between knots for extra decoration
